summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quote Kanban Board feature for Konekt Business OS. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend functionality verified - 4 columns, quote cards, details drawer, status changes, search, and navigation all working correctly.

quote_pipeline_api.get_pipeline: PASS - GET /api/admin/quotes/pipeline returns quotes grouped by status columns (draft, sent, approved, converted, other)
quote_pipeline_api.pipeline_quote_structure: PASS - Quote objects contain required fields (id, quote_number, customer_name, status, total, created_at)
quote_pipeline_api.get_pipeline_stats: PASS - GET /api/admin/quotes/pipeline/stats returns total, draft, sent, approved, converted, rejected, expired counts + total_value

quote_move_api.move_valid_status: PASS - PATCH /api/admin/quotes/{id}/move?status={status} moves quote to valid status
quote_move_api.move_all_kanban_statuses: PASS - Quote can be moved through all kanban statuses (draft→sent→approved→converted)
quote_move_api.move_non_kanban_statuses: PASS - Quote can be moved to rejected and expired statuses
quote_move_api.move_invalid_status: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid status value
quote_move_api.move_not_found: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent quote ID

pipeline_consistency.pipeline_stats_match: PASS - Pipeline summary counts match stats endpoint counts
pipeline_consistency.move_updates_pipeline: PASS - Moving quote correctly updates column counts

related_apis.send_quote: PASS - POST /api/admin/send/quote/{id} returns stub response (MOCKED - email not integrated)
related_apis.convert_to_order: PASS - POST /api/admin/quotes-v2/convert-to-order converts approved quote to order

frontend_kanban_page.four_columns: PASS - 4 kanban columns displayed (Draft, Sent, Approved, Converted)
frontend_kanban_page.column_headers: PASS - Each column shows title, description, and count badge
frontend_kanban_page.quote_cards: PASS - 14 quote cards displayed with quote_number, customer_name, company, total, valid_until, created_at, status badge
frontend_kanban_page.stats_display: PASS - Top stats show All Quotes count, Draft count, Approved count, Total Value
frontend_kanban_page.search_input: PASS - Search input filters quotes by number, customer, or company
frontend_kanban_page.navigation_link: PASS - Quote Kanban link visible in sidebar under BUSINESS OS section

frontend_details_drawer.drawer_opens: PASS - Clicking quote card opens details drawer
frontend_details_drawer.customer_info: PASS - Drawer shows customer name, email, company, phone, status, valid_until
frontend_details_drawer.line_items_table: PASS - Line items table with description, qty, unit_price, total
frontend_details_drawer.totals_breakdown: PASS - Shows subtotal, tax, discount, total
frontend_details_drawer.status_dropdown: PASS - Status dropdown allows changing quote status
frontend_details_drawer.convert_button: PASS - Convert to Order button present (disabled when status=converted)
frontend_details_drawer.export_pdf_button: PASS - Export PDF button present and functional
frontend_details_drawer.send_quote_button: PASS - Send Quote button present and functional (MOCKED)

frontend_interactions.status_change_via_dropdown: PASS - Changing status in drawer moves quote to new column
frontend_interactions.pipeline_updates_after_move: PASS - Column counts update after status change

seed_data_creation: No new test data created. Used existing quotes in database (14 total).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Kanban feature is fully functional. Send Quote uses MOCKED email stub (no actual email sent). Drag-and-drop not tested via Playwright but move API verified. Convert to Order works for approved quotes only.

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/admin/send/quote/{id} - Returns stub success, no actual email sent

features_verified: GET /api/admin/quotes/pipeline - Returns quotes grouped by status columns
PATCH /api/admin/quotes/{quote_id}/move?status={status} - Moves quote to different stage
Quote Kanban page loads with 4 columns (Draft, Sent, Approved, Converted)
Quote cards display quote number, customer name, total, and valid until date
Clicking on a quote card opens a details drawer
Details drawer shows customer info, line items, totals, and actions
Status dropdown in drawer changes quote status
Convert to Order button works for approved quotes
Export PDF button opens PDF endpoint
Send Quote button triggers send action (MOCKED)
Search functionality filters quotes across all columns
Navigation link to Quote Kanban is visible in sidebar
